description_long: This is a round, analog clock with a wooden exterior casing that mimics the look of natural, textured wood grain. The clock face is white with bold, black Arabic numerals and three black hands for hours, minutes, and seconds. The casing is thick and cylindrical, with a metallic knob or winding mechanism at the top. The wood texture is detailed, showing knots and grain patterns, giving it a rustic and handcrafted appearance. The back and sides are fully enclosed in wood, with no visible openings or mounting hardware. The overall design suggests a sturdy, decorative piece suitable for display on a flat surface.
description: A round, analog clock with a thick wooden casing, white face, and bold black numerals and hands. The design is rustic and decorative, featuring a metallic knob on top.
description_view_0: Front view showing the white clock face with black Arabic numerals and three black hands, encased in a thick wooden frame.
description_view_1: Side view displaying the cylindrical wooden casing with prominent wood grain texture and the metallic knob on top.
description_view_2: Back view revealing a smooth, uninterrupted wooden surface with visible knots and grain patterns.
description_view_3: Opposite side view similar to view 1, highlighting the wood grain texture and the metallic knob.
attribute_face_design: Circular white face with bold black Arabic numerals and three black hands, encased in a thick wooden frame.
